title: crash on select query from sqlitelogictests
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0 (pk INT, col0 INT, col1 DOUBLE, col2 VARCHAR(255), col3 INT, col4 DOUBLE, col5 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT pk FROM tab0 WHERE (col1 < 94.60) AND (col0 < 90) AND col3 >= 40 AND (col0 > 89);
key_bug_features: SELECT query with multiple conditions on different columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 DOUBLE, name VARCHAR(100), active BOOLEAN);
SELECT id FROM tab1 WHERE (value1 > 5) AND (value2 < 30.0) AND (active IS TRUE);
SELECT id FROM tab1 WHERE (value1 < 10) OR (value2 IS NULL) AND (name LIKE 'test%');
